sections.paragraph:
βουλεύω in our lit. only mid. βουλεύομαι; impf. ἐβουλευόμην; fut. βουλεύσομαι Lk 14:31; 1 aor. ἐβουλευσάμην; pf. βεβούλευμαι LXX; B 6:7.

① to think about a course of action, deliberate (w. oneself) w. indir. question foll. (Jos., Ant. 1, 339) εἰ Lk 14:31 (cp. X., Mem. 3, 6, 8 Diog. L. 1, 64); ἐβουλεύσαντο οἱ ἱερεῖς τίνα ἀναστήσουσιν GJs 24:4; consider τὶ someth. (Appian, Hann. 54 §227 β. ἀπόστασιν=consider a revolt) Hv 1, 1, 2 and 8; Hs 9, 28, 5.

② to reach a decision about a course of action, resolve, decide w. acc. ἅ (Jdth 9:6; 12:4) 2 Cor 1:17; βουλὴν πονηράν B 6:7 (Is 3:9). W. inf. foll. (PTebt 58, 28; PFay 116, 9; 2 Ch 30:23; Wsd 18:5; 1 Macc 8:9; Jos., C. Ap. 2, 296 v.l.; Just., D. 72, 3) Ac 5:33 v.l.; 15:37 v.l.; 27:39. W. ἵνα foll. (B-D-F §392, 1a) J 11:53 (EBammel, CMoule Festschr., ’70, 11–40); 12:10.—DELG s.v. βούλομαι. M-M.

lit. lit. = literal(ly); literature (refererences to [scholarly] literature)

impf. impf. = imperfect

fut. fut. = fut.

aor. aor. = aorist

  1. pf. = perfect

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

B B = Barnabas (the Letter of), II a.d., except in series of uncial witnesses, in which case B refers to Codex Vaticanus (s. also Vat.). When the abbrv. B would ambiguous, Vat. is used for the codex.—List 1

indir. indir. = indirect

foll. foll. = followed, following

Jos. Jos. = Josephus. This abbr. used when follow by title; I a.d.—Lists 5

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts
  2. X. = Xenophon, V–IV b.c.—List 5

Diog. L. Diog. L. = Diogenes Laertius, III a.d.—List 5

GJs GJs = Gospel of James (Protevangelium Jacobi), II a.d.—List 1

someth. someth. = something

Appian Appian , I–II a.d.—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

Hs Hs = Similitudes

acc. acc. = accusative

inf. inf. = infinitive

PTebt PTebt = The Tebtunis Papyri—List 4

PFay PFay = Fayûm Towns and Their Papyri—List 4

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

Just Just , II a.d.—List 5

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

Festschr. Festschr. = Festschrift, in ref. to any honorary publication

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 181
